description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a long-sleeve sweatshirt with a visible logo or text across the chest, paired with loose-fitting jeans and white athletic sneakers. The figure has a medium build and stands in a neutral, upright pose with arms slightly extended downward. The facial features are defined, and the hairstyle is short and closely cropped. The clothing appears layered, with a shirt peeking out from under the sweatshirt. The figure's hands are relaxed at the sides, and one hand appears to be holding a dark rectangular object, possibly a phone or wallet. The overall appearance suggests a typical city pedestrian, ready for everyday activities.
description: An adult male in casual urban clothing, wearing a sweatshirt, jeans, and sneakers, standing upright with a relaxed posture and holding a small object in one hand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sweatshirt's logo, facial features, and both arms extended slightly outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the relaxed arm, and the object held in the left hand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sweatshirt, jeans, and the overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, relaxed arm, and unobstructed view of the sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sweatshirt and jeans with athletic footwear
